message:
fix: repair 4 bugs in rebuild_issues_table schema migration

- Add missing title column to all_expected so rebuilt table preserves
  issue titles (was silently dropping them)
- Add CHECK(priority >= 0 AND priority <= 4) to ISSUE_COLUMNS so the
  constraint survives table rebuilds
- Wrap rebuild in BEGIN EXCLUSIVE / COMMIT transaction with ROLLBACK on
  error to prevent data loss on crash between DROP and RENAME
- Quote index names in DROP INDEX to prevent SQL injection

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
